name: wxcode-admin-ember-campaigns
title: Ember Campaigns Admin
description: Vibrant-but-clean marketing command centre — left sidebar, topbar with date-range filter, 4 KPI cards (reach / CTR / spend / ROAS) with inline SVG sparklines, a multi-series campaign performance chart, a conversion funnel, and a campaigns table with channel chips and status pills. Rose-pink accent on white/slate canvas.

query.en: Build me a marketing campaign analytics admin — left sidebar, date-range topbar, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, multi-series performance chart, conversion funnel, and campaigns table with channel chips.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a marketing campaign analytics admin — left sidebar, date-range topbar, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, multi-series performance chart, conversion funnel, and campaigns table with channel chips.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
